critical.mandate: Story must be in review status before security review
Check against all OWASP Top 10 categories
Flag hardcoded secrets, API keys, credentials
Output must include machine-readable PASSED or FAILED verdict

step.title: Load Context
step.action: Read the story file to understand what was built
Read {planning_artifacts}/threat-model.md if available — understand applicable threats
Identify code files changed or created by this story

step.title: Status Gate
step.action: Verify story is in 'review' status
step.check: HALT: Story must be in review status before security review

step.title: OWASP Top 10 Scan
step.action: Check code changes against each OWASP category:
A01: Broken Access Control — authorization checks, RBAC, CORS
A02: Cryptographic Failures — encryption, hashing, key management
A03: Injection — SQL, XSS, command injection, input validation
A04: Insecure Design — missing security controls in design
A05: Security Misconfiguration — default configs, unnecessary features
A06: Vulnerable Components — outdated dependencies, known CVEs
A07: Auth Failures — password policies, session management, MFA
A08: Data Integrity Failures — deserialization, CI/CD integrity
A09: Logging Failures — insufficient logging, missing audit trail
A10: SSRF — server-side request forgery vectors

step.title: Secrets Scan
step.action: Check for hardcoded secrets, API keys, credentials in code
Verify secrets are loaded from environment or secrets manager
Check .gitignore covers sensitive files (.env, credentials, keys)

step.title: Auth Pattern Review
step.action: Verify authentication flow follows security best practices
Check authorization at every access point (not just UI)
Validate session management and token handling
Check for privilege escalation paths

step.title: Generate Findings
step.action: Classify each finding by severity: critical, high, medium, low, info
Include: finding description, location, OWASP category, remediation suggestion
Provide overall security risk assessment

step.title: Verdict
step.action: If NO critical or high severity findings: verdict is PASSED
If ANY critical or high severity finding exists: verdict is FAILED — list blocking findings

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate security review report with: summary, OWASP findings table, secrets scan results, auth review results, overall risk assessment, and machine-readable verdict (PASSED/FAILED).

step.title: Update Review Gate and Transition
step.action: Read story file, locate Review Gate table
If PASSED: update Security Review row status to PASSED, link report file
If FAILED: update Security Review row status to FAILED, link report file. Do NOT change story status — the review-gate-check protocol or run-all-reviews orchestrator handles status transitions.
step.template-output: Update story file Review Gate table with security review result and report link.
